channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Friends turned foes: The split reshaping Senegal
item.description: Ousmane Sonko reveals what ended his political partnership with the president, sparking a constitutional standoff.

item.title: Marc Marquez dominates Germany MotoGP to close in on championship lead
item.description: Reigning champion won his 10th German Grand Prix and moves to within 18 points of the riders' championship lead.

item.title: Ukraine’s Zelenskyy announces cabinet reshuffle, replaces PM Svyrydenko
item.description: Yulia Svyrydenko to step down amid government shake-up aimed at prioritising foreign policy and security goals.

item.title: Pape Thiaw fired as Senegal coach after disappointing FIFA World Cup
item.description: Senegal part ways with their head coach after the national side's elimination from the tournament at the last-32 stage.

item.title: Former Emir Sheikh Hamad Bin Khalifa Al Thani’s legacy in Palestine
item.description: Former Emir Sheikh Hamad Bin Khalifa Al Thani's legacy in Palestine

item.title: Republican Lindsey Graham dies at 71: World leaders, US politicians react
item.description: The longtime US senator, an ally of President Trump, was an advocate for using US military force overseas.

item.title: How Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani built Qatar’s soft power
item.description: Leader known as Qatar's father emir was able to redefine his nation's position on the political map of the Middle East.

item.title: Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani: key mediations
item.description: Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani: key mediations

item.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Biggest takeaways from the quarterfinals
item.description: The quarterfinals are now behind us, with plenty of key moments and incidents as the tournament enters the final four.

item.title: Qatar mourns Father Emir Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani
item.description: Qatar mourns Father Emir Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani

item.title: British police make new arrest in Ann Widdecombe murder investigation
item.description: Police arrest 28-year-old suspect in South Yorkshire in connection with the murder of former MP Ann Widdecombe.

item.title: Typhoon Bavi weakens to tropical storm as it slams into eastern China
item.description: Storm the size of France expected to bring days of heavy rains and strong winds to eastern and northern provinces.

item.title: IRGC releases video of retaliatory missile strikes
item.description: IRGC releases video of retaliatory missile strikes

item.title: Key moments from former Qatar Emir Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani’s life
item.description: Sheikh Hamad's 18-year rule catapulted Qatar to prosperity and reshaped its domestic, regional and global footprint.

item.title: Photos: Qatari Father Emir Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani
item.description: Sheikh Hamad, who ruled Qatar from 1995 to 2013 and stepped aside to make his son Sheikh Tamim emir, dies aged 74.

item.title: The spectacle and symbolism of Khamenei’s funeral
item.description: How coverage of the supreme leader's funeral exposed the limits of familiar narratives about Iran.

item.title: Former Emir of Qatar Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani dies: Reactions
item.description: After Sheikh Hamad's death, global leaders offer condolences, praise his legacy and Qatar’s growth.

item.title: Iran attacks five Gulf nations, shuts Hormuz after US bombing: All to know
item.description: Tehran hits back at several GCC countries, following the most intense US bombing since an MoU was signed last month.

item.title: Watch World Cup: England beat Norway to set up semifinal against Argentina
item.description: Latest match highlights, reaction and previews from the FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America.

item.title: US CENTCOM completes third round of strikes on Iran
item.description: US CENTCOM completes third round of strikes on Iran

item.title: Missiles and drones fired at Gulf states after night of US strikes on Iran
item.description: Three people injured by falling shrapnel in Qatar as attacks also reported in UAE, Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman and Jordan.

item.title: France vs Spain World Cup semifinal: Prediction, Mbappe-Yamal, venue, stats
item.description: European football titans France and Spain meet in a blockbuster FIFA World Cup 2026 final four matchup in Dallas.

item.title: IRGC vows ‘crushing response’ to any further US attacks
item.description: IRGC vows ‘crushing response’ to any further US attacks

item.title: Lindsey Graham, one of Israel’s strongest US Senate allies, dies at 71
item.description: The US Republican senator died of a sudden illness, his office said. He was 71.

item.title: Ghana slavery apology: Why many descendants say words are not enough
item.description: Descendants of enslaved Africans say symbolic apologies cannot repair generations of loss and injustice.
